particulars.description: All and whole the subjects known as and forming 9E sandgate, ayr, KA7 1BG being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number AYR9353.
All and whole the subjects known as and forming 1D sandgate, ayr, KA7 1BG being the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number AYR108551.

All and whole the property together with the block common parts, the alma place common parts and the rights which subjects form part and portion of all and whole those subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number PTH5013. Where. “Alma place common parts” shall mean a right in common with the other alma place properties to (a) the mutual access and parking area tinted yellow on the title plan and (b) that part of the communal drying area tinted green on the title plan .. “alma place properties” shall mean the block, 1A alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 1B alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 1C alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 2 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 3 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG and 4 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG all as edged red on the title plan.. “Block common parts” shall mean a right in common with the proprietors of the block (and where appropriate with other proprietors of all or some of the alma place properties) to (a) that area or piece of ground tinted blue on the title plan and the fences, walls and others erected around the same (b) the solum of the block (c) the foundations, gables, internal and external walls (d) the gutters, rhones, downpipes, common drains, soil and rainwater pipes, tanks, cisterns, conductors, electricity mains, cables, pipes and wires and (e) that area edged in green on the title plan (f) that area edged in brown on the title plan (g) that area tinted red on the title plan and (h) all other parts and services common and mutual to the block.. “Block” shall mean those subjects 5 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 6 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 7 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG and 8 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG situated within the building edged blue on the title plan.. “Flats” shall mean those subjects 6 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 7 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG and 8 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG part of the block.. “Property” shall mean that flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 5 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG being the eastmost house on ground and first floor of the block entering to and from that area or piece of ground tinted blue on the title plan.. “Rights” a right of access over the block for the purposes of maintaining, repairing and where necessary renewing the property, the flat common parts and the block common parts subject always to restoration of all damage occasioned thereby.. “Title plan” shall mean the title plan pertaining to PTH5013.

All and whole the property together with the block common parts, the flat common parts, the alma place common parts and the rights which subjects form part and portion of all and whole those subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number PTH5013. Where. “Alma place common parts” shall mean a right in common with the other alma place properties to (a) the mutual access and parking area tinted yellow on the title plan and (b) that part of the communal drying area tinted green on the title plan.. “Alma place properties” shall mean the block, 1A alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 1B alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 1C alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 2 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 3 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG and 4 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG all as edged red on the title plan.. “Block common parts” shall mean a right in common with the proprietors of the block (and where appropriate with other proprietors of all or some of the alma place properties) to (a) that area or piece of ground tinted blue on the title plan and the fences, walls and others erected around the same (b) the solum of the block (c) the foundations, gables, internal and external walls (d) the gutters, rhones, downpipes, common drains, soil and rainwater pipes, tanks, cisterns, conductors, electricity mains, cables, pipes and wires and (e) that area edged in green on the title plan (f) that area edged in brown on the title plan (g) that area tinted red on the title plan and (h) all other parts and services common and mutual to the block.. “Block” shall mean those subjects 5 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 6 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 7 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG and 8 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG situated within the building edged blue on the title plan. “Flat common parts” shall mean a right in common with the other flats to (a) the area of ground tinted mauve on the title plan being the solum of the mutual entrance, staircase and landings serving the flats (b) that portion of the roof of the building comprising the block over and exclusive to the flats (but specifically excluding the dormer window pertaining exclusively to 8 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG which shall be owned by the proprietors of that property) and (c) all other parts and services common and mutual to the flats.. “Flats” shall mean those subjects 6 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG, 7 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG and 8 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG part of the block.. “Property” shall mean that flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 7 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG being the westmost flat on the first floor of the block.. “Rights” a right of access over the block for the purposes of maintaining, repairing and where necessary renewing the property, the flat common parts and the block common parts subject always to restoration of all damage occasioned thereby.. “Title plan” shall mean the title plan pertaining to PTH5013.

All and whole the property together with the rights which subjects form part and portion of the parent titles. Where. “Building” shall mean that tenement comprising 7 galvelmore street, crieff (excluding the ground to the rear of the tenement), 9 galvelmore street, crieff, the stables, galvelmore street, crieff, 11A galvelmore street, crieff, 11B galvelmore street, crieff, 11C galvelmore street, crieff, and 11D galvelmore street, crieff.. “Deed of conditions” shall mean burdens entry 4 within title number PTH5013.. “Parent titles” shall mean (1) those subjects 7 galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY registered under title number PTH42148 and (2) those subjects described (first) and edged and numbered 1 in red on the title plan pertaining to PTH5013 under exceptions as stated therein.. “Property” shall mean that flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 11A galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY being the ground floor flat within the area tinted blue (excluding the area hatched red) on the title plan.. “Rear ground” shall mean the area-coloured pink on the title plan to the rear of the building but always excluding therefrom, the building.. “Rights” shall mean (a) a servitude right of access to and use of the bins allocated for the use of the property such bins situated within the rear ground (b) a servitude right of pedestrian and vehicular access through the access pend and rear ground to, and use of, the single parking space allocated for the use of the property, such parking space situated within the rear ground and (c) all rights common, mutual or otherwise detailed in the deed of conditions as benefitting a unit (as defined in the deed of conditions) which shall benefit the property.. “Title plan” shall mean the supplementary title plan PTH5013-1 pertaining to title PTH5013.

All and whole the property together with the rights which subjects form part and portion of the parent titles. Where. “Building” shall mean that tenement comprising 7 galvelmore street, crieff (excluding the ground to the rear of the tenement), 9 galvelmore street, crieff, the stables, galvelmore street, crieff, 11A galvelmore street, crieff, 11B galvelmore street, crieff, 11C galvelmore street, crieff, and 11D galvelmore street, crieff.. “Deed of conditions” shall mean burdens entry 4 within title number PTH5013.. “Parent titles” shall mean (1) those subjects 7 galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY registered under title number PTH42148 and (2) those subjects described (first) and edged and numbered 1 in red on the title plan pertaining to PTH5013 under exceptions as stated therein.. “Property” shall mean that flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 11D galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY being the second floor flat within the area tinted blue on the title plan.. “Rear ground” shall mean the area-coloured pink on the title plan to the rear of the building but always excluding therefrom, the building. “Rights” shall mean (a) a servitude right of access to and use of the bins allocated for the use of the property such bins situated within the rear ground (b) a servitude right of pedestrian and vehicular access through the access pend and rear ground to, and use of, the single parking space allocated for the use of the property, such parking space situated within the rear ground and (c) all rights common, mutual or otherwise detailed in the deed of conditions as benefitting a unit (as defined in the deed of conditions) which shall benefit the property.. “Title plan” shall mean the supplementary title plan PTH5013-1 pertaining to title PTH5013.

All and whole the property together with the rights which subjects form part and portion of the parent titles. Where. “Building” shall mean that tenement known as 10-16 galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY.. “Parent titles” shall mean the subjects described (first) in the title PTH5010 within the land edged and numbered 1 in red on the title plan.. “Property” shall mean that flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 12 galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY being the northmost flat on the first floor of the building.. “Rights” shall mean a common right along with the other proprietors within the building to (one) the solum on which the building is erected, (two) the garden ground tinted pink on the title plan, (three) the foundations, outside walls, gables, roof and any chimney vents and stalks and any internal division walls between the property and the remainder of the building, (four) the access pend and stair tinted yellow on the said plan together with free ish and entry to the property by way of the said common access pend and stair as necessary, (five) the drains, soil and rain water pipes, water supply pipes, tanks, cisterns, rhones, gutters, conductors, gas and electric mains and all pipes, cables, wires and transmitters and connections so far as used in common.. “Title plan” shall mean the title plan pertaining to title PTH5010 and expressly the land edged and numbered 1 in red.

All and whole the property together with the rights which subjects form part and portion of the parent titles. Where. “Building” shall mean that tenement known as 10-16 galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY.. “Parent titles” shall mean the subjects described (first) in the title PTH5010 within the land edged and numbered 1 in red on the title plan.. “Property” shall mean that flatted dwellinghouse known as and forming 14A galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY being the southmost flat on the first floor of the building.. “Rights” shall mean a common right along with the other proprietors within the building to (one) the solum on which the building is erected, (two) the garden ground tinted pink on the title plan, (three) the foundations, outside walls, gables, roof and any chimney vents and stalks and any internal division walls between the property and the remainder of the building, (four) the access pend and stair tinted yellow on the said plan together with free ish and entry to the property by way of the said common access pend and stair as necessary, (five) the drains, soil and rain water pipes, water supply pipes, tanks, cisterns, rhones, gutters, conductors, gas and electric mains and all pipes, cables, wires and transmitters and connections so far as used in common.. “Title plan” shall mean the title plan pertaining to title PTH5010 and expressly the land edged and numbered 1 in red.

29C east hight street being the westmost dwellinghouse on the second floor of the block 29-31 east high street which subjects form part and portion of all and whole the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number PTH5010; but always with and under in so far as still valid and subsisting the conditions, obligations and burdens specified in title number PTH5010.

All and whole those subjects known as and forming 2 alma place, crieff PH7 3JG tinted blue within the land edged and numbered 4 in red on the title plan pertaining to title number PTH5010 ("plan"); together with a common or mutual right to (first) the portions of ground tinted brown within the subjects edged and numbered 4 in red on the plan, (second) the ground tinted yellow within the subjects edged and numbered 4 in red on the plan for the purposes of access to (a) the remaining subjects in alma place and (b) the communal drying area tinted green within the subjects edged and numbered 4 in red on the plan; which subjects form part and portion of all and whole those subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number PTH5010.

29A east hight street being the westmost dwellinghouse on the first floor of the block 29-31 east high street which subjects form part and portion of all and whole the subjects registered in the land register of scotland under title number PTH5010; but always with and under in so far as still valid and subsisting the conditions, obligations and burdens specified in title number PTH5010.

All and whole 82B king street, crieff (otherwise known as 82D king street, crieff) being the westmost or northwestmost house on the top floor of the the tenement 80-84 king street, crieff being the subjects described third in title PTH5010 and shown within the land edged and numbered 3 in red on the title plan PTH5010 which subjects form part and portion of all and whole the subjects registered under title number PTH5010.

(First) all and whole those subjects 7 galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY registered under title number PTH42148 and (second) all and whole those subjects the stables, galvelmore street, crieff PH7 4BY coloured red and green on the supplementary title plan PTH5013-1 pertaining to title PTH5013 which subjects form part and portion of those subjects described (first) and edged and numbered 1 in red on the title plan pertaining to PTH5013 under exceptions as stated therein.
